main.description: Remove (negate) a peer-moderation label the caller previously applied. Caller must be in PEER_MOD_DIDS and must be the original applier. Forwards a negation event to Ozone (modEventLabel negateLabelVals) and stamps negated_at on the peer_mod_labels row.

errors.name: PeerModRequired
errors.description: The caller is not in the peer-moderator allowlist.

errors.name: LabelNotOwned
errors.description: The caller did not apply this label, so cannot remove it.

errors.name: OzoneFailed
errors.description: Ozone rejected the modEventLabel negate call; nothing was changed.
